hero.title: Create a verified SIARA account.
hero.subtitle: Set up your safety workspace, link your alert zones, and receive weekly summaries for the places you watch most closely.

form.title: Create your account
form.subtitle: Verification keeps your alerts, weekly emails, and recovery flows tied to the right inbox.

form.agreeTerms: I agree to SIARA's terms of use and responsible reporting guidelines.
